artifact.content_preview:
From: noc-team@ssc-spc.gc.ca
To: alice.tran@ssc-spc.gc.ca
Subject: Network Operations Centre — Monitoring Tooling Question
Date: March 7, 2026

Hi Alice,

During our review of the Site A migration runbook, our NOC team raised
a question that we wanted to flag to the project.

Currently, the NOC uses SolarWinds NPM for network monitoring across all
GC infrastructure. As part of the Catalyst 9500 switch deployment, we
will need to ensure that the new switches are properly onboarded into
the SolarW

extracted_tasks.text: Onboard new Catalyst 9500 switches into SolarWinds platform with appropriate polling intervals and alert thresholds.
extracted_tasks.source_excerpt: ensure that the new switches are properly onboarded into the SolarWinds platform

extracted_tasks.text: Upgrade SolarWinds NPM module to version 2024.1 to support Catalyst 9500 platform.
extracted_tasks.source_excerpt: requires upgrading the NPM module to version 2024.1

extracted_tasks.text: Decide if the NPM upgrade should be included in NGIS Phase 3 or handled separately.
extracted_tasks.source_excerpt: Should the NPM upgrade be included as part of the NGIS Phase 3 network migration activities?

extracted_tasks.text: Review Site A migration runbook regarding NOC team concerns.
extracted_tasks.source_excerpt: During our review of the Site A migration runbook, our NOC team raised a question

metadata.subject: Network Operations Centre — Monitoring Tooling Question

alerts.detected_ask: Upgrading the SolarWinds NPM module to version 2024.1, including configuration and database schema changes.
alerts.baseline_reference: OUT OF SCOPE: Network monitoring tool upgrades
alerts.suggested_action: Reject the inclusion of the NPM upgrade in the current project scope. Direct the NOC team to initiate a separate internal maintenance task or Change Request (CR) outside of this project's budget to perform the upgrade prior to the Site A Go-Live.

llm_calls.content:
```json
{
  "alignment_score": 0.2,
  "drift_type": "scope_expansion",
  "detected_ask": "Upgrading the SolarWinds NPM module to version 2024.1, including configuration and database schema changes.",
  "baseline_reference": "OUT OF SCOPE: Network monitoring tool upgrades",
  "suggested_action": "Reject the inclusion of the NPM upgrade in the current project scope. Direct the NOC team to initiate a separate internal maintenance task or Change Request (CR) outside of this project's budget to perform the upgrade prior to the Site A Go-Live.",
  "reasoning": "The request directly conflicts with a specific 'OUT OF SCOPE' exclusion regarding network monitoring tool upgrades. While the deployment of Catalyst 9500 switches is in scope, the baseline explicitly excludes the upgrading of the tools used to monitor them. Including this would introduce technical risk (database schema changes) and resource strain not accounted for in the $2.4M budget or the April 30 Go-Live constraint."
}
```

parsed_json.detected_ask: Upgrading the SolarWinds NPM module to version 2024.1, including configuration and database schema changes.
parsed_json.baseline_reference: OUT OF SCOPE: Network monitoring tool upgrades
parsed_json.suggested_action: Reject the inclusion of the NPM upgrade in the current project scope. Direct the NOC team to initiate a separate internal maintenance task or Change Request (CR) outside of this project's budget to perform the upgrade prior to the Site A Go-Live.
parsed_json.reasoning: The request directly conflicts with a specific 'OUT OF SCOPE' exclusion regarding network monitoring tool upgrades. While the deployment of Catalyst 9500 switches is in scope, the baseline explicitly excludes the upgrading of the tools used to monitor them. Including this would introduce technical risk (database schema changes) and resource strain not accounted for in the $2.4M budget or the April 30 Go-Live constraint.
